content: The Ryukyu Kingdom maintained 450 years of sovereign diplomacy before 1879. That institutional memory did not vanish. It was archived. The question is who controls the archive.

AI does not generate ideas. It surfaces probabilities. The architect's role is to recognize which probability carries sovereign intent, then cut everything else. That editorial violence is the actual craft.
M7a and D1a2a haplogroups place Ryukyuan genetic lineage outside the standard Yamato narrative. The biology was never ambiguous. The politics made it so.
